evidence: Regenerated against the INTEGRATED master (merge of worktree-wf_023eceaa-423-43 into master@ef6593a=U-004), superseding the earlier artifact that pointed at the pre-fix -24 worktree (Reviewer M-A). U-005's -43 was cut from ccb5290 (pre-U-004), so integration was a real 3-way merge: U-004 and U-005 both rewrote src/ui/CanvasStage.tsx from the common U-003 base. Reconciled onto U-004's ToolSession architecture (seedForgeMotif -> session buffer; fg-sync effect feeds effectivePaintColor->session.fg snapped when locked; indexed effect quantizes/paletteSwaps session.getBuffer() via session.setBuffer()); trivial additive conflicts in core/state barrels + vite.config held-out include. Held-out files byte-identical to canonical copies. Post-merge master gate (all re-run on the merged tree): `npm run typecheck` (tsc -b) exit 0; `npm run lint` (biome check .) exit 0, 112 files clean; `npm test` (vitest run) 22 files / 338 tests, exit 0 (incl. U-003/U-004/U-005 held-out acceptance); explicit held-out `vitest run docs/acceptance/U-005/palette.acceptance.test.ts` 1 file / 8 tests exit 0; `npm run test:browser` 6 files / 27 tests exit 0 (incl. 3 CanvasStage palette-lock tests exercising the H-1 fix on the NEW ToolSession architecture, plus the ColorPalettePanel browser tests); `npm run build` (tsc -b && vite build) exit 0, 71 modules, dist/index.html + assets/index-*.js 258.84KB (81.93KB gzip) + index-*.css 18.15KB + 8 woff2; `npx playwright test` 4/4 exit 0 (incl. e2e/indexed-lock.spec.ts on the built app: free mode draws off-palette, locked mode quantizes + blocks); `npm run coverage` core stmts 97.09% / branch 93.79% / funcs 100% / lines 96.92% (gate 80%). Reward-hack scan of the integrated diff: no .skip/.only/.todo/xit/@ts-ignore/@ts-nocheck/@ts-expect-error/process.exit; zero edits to held-out test/criteria files; the only hardcoded color values are the spec-authoritative §4.4 built-in palette hexes. Clean gate.
